name: OWASP Checklist Agent
description: Evaluates the codebase against the OWASP Top 10 (2021). Checks for injection vulnerabilities, broken authentication, security misconfigurations, and supply chain risks.

checks.prompt: Evaluate this codebase against the OWASP Top 10 (2021). For each of the 10 categories, provide: status (PASS/FAIL/WARN/N/A), evidence or lack thereof, CVSS score if applicable, and recommended remediation. Categories: A01 Broken Access Control, A02 Cryptographic Failures, A03 Injection, A04 Insecure Design, A05 Security Misconfiguration, A06 Vulnerable Components, A07 Auth Failures, A08 Data Integrity Failures, A09 Logging Failures, A10 SSRF. Context: {retryContext}
